answer: Yes, Zoho Cliq offers a free tier that includes access to developer APIs [1][2]. You can build custom extensions or integrations using their REST API and serverless platform at no additional setup or maintenance cost [3]. To get started, register your application in the Zoho API Console to obtain your Client ID and Client Secret [4][5]. The latest API version is v3, with the root endpoint located at `https://cliq.zoho.com/api/v3` [6]. Authentication is handled via the OAuth 2.0 protocol using the Bearer scheme with the prefix "Zoho-oauthtoken" [5][2].
